creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text:
Hello. I'm trying to reproduce the error but without success. Starting from https://www.freebsd.org/where.html in the main table "FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE" following the links will result in the actual correct files. I verified other options from the page but still cannot reproduce what you're explaining.
Can you inform what is the exactly link, starting from https://www.freebsd.org/where.html that ended in the explained situation, please?
Thank you!
